issues.title: Test 1 duplicates existing test_invalid_form_still_returns_form
issues.attack: Proposed test is nearly identical to existing test at line 141-150. Only adds trivial '추천 서류' assertion.
issues.response: Genuine duplicate. Remove and replace with new edge case.

issues.title: Test 4 duplicates existing test_overview_funnel_excludes_reserved_from_contacts
issues.attack: Functionally identical to existing test at line 365-384. Proposed assertion is weaker.
issues.response: Genuine duplicate. Remove and replace with new edge case.

issues.title: Test 2 missing interested_contact fixture — passes for wrong reason
issues.attack: Without interested_contact, candidate not in queryset regardless. Test passes because 'not in queryset' not 'duplicate prevented'.
issues.response: Fix: add interested_contact fixture and verify Submission count stays at 1.

issues.title: Step 3 expected test count wrong
issues.attack: Plan says 13 but file has 17 tests. With changes, total should be 19.

issues.title: Step 4 regression scope too narrow
issues.attack: Only runs p05, p06. Should include p07 for submission tests.

issues.title: Test 2 should verify specific error message
issues.attack: Only checks status and headers, not the actual validation error content.

issues.title: Tests should go in existing classes instead of new class
issues.attack: Remaining tests could be placed in existing classes for better organization.
issues.response: Cross-cutting integration tests belong in dedicated class for organizational clarity.
